arts.sum: Real Sociedad host second-placed Ajax in the Europa League on Thursday evening, having struggled to find consistency so far this season. La Real were beaten 1-0 by Athletic Club on Sunday evening, an...

arts.ttl: Weghorst left out of Ajax’s trip to Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Wout Weghorst has been left out of the Ajax squad for the Europa League match against Real Sociedad. The striker is not fit enough to travel to San Sebastián.

arts.ttl: Wout Weghorst ruled out of Ajax squad for Europa League clash with Real Sociedad over fitness concerns
arts.sum: Ajax have confirmed that Wout Weghorst will not travel to Spain for Thursday’s Europa League tie against Real Sociedad. The striker is unavailable due to a fitness issue. Ajax do…

arts.ttl: Preview: Real Sociedad vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Real Sociedad and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
